description: beat with requiredPayoffs (seeds — facts this beat must set up); full mode

scenes.description: Wulfgar receives a letter sealed with a forgotten crest.
He turns the seal toward the firelight.
He breaks the seal and reads the letter.
The crest reveals the sender's house.

establishedFacts.fact: A sealed letter from the south arrives at the hall
The wax seal bears the lost crest of House Vellaen

characters.name: Wulfgar
characters.speechPattern: earnest and deliberate, prone to oaths
characters.internalConflict: torn between his clan's expectations and his own bond
characters.goals: prove worthy of his father's name

locations.name: Bruenor's Hall
locations.description: The dwarven hold's great hearth chamber.
locations.sensoryDetails: smoke, ale-warm air, hammers in the next chamber
